prompt: The user wants a micro-SaaS for ecommerce reporting and immediately proposes a broad analytics suite. Scope the product.
assertions: Response cuts the broad analytics suite down to a narrower wedge with one primary user and one core workflow.
Response includes at least 3 items in manual_work or automated_first where appropriate, showing a real boundary between manual and automated work.
Response includes at least 3 do_not_build_yet items that exclude broad platform behavior.
Response includes valid JSON matching assets/micro-saas-scope-template.json.
